title: Your brag doc is a debug log
hook: If you wait until review season to remember your work, you are reconstructing production from vibes. Keep the log while the evidence is still warm.

blocks.html: Six months is a long time in engineering time. You fixed the flaky deploy, mentored the new hire, killed a costly query, wrote the doc everyone uses, and quietly prevented three incidents. Then review season arrives and your brain offers: "worked on checkout."

lines.t: reduced weekly deploy failures from 6 to 1
trained two engineers on incident rotation

blocks.caption: Career systems are still systems. Pull out evidence and everything gets harder to debug.

blocks.html: A brag doc is not a diary of tasks. It is a searchable record of outcomes, scope, collaboration, learning, and receipts. Link the PR, dashboard, incident review, launch note, or customer quote. Make the evidence easy to inspect.

blocks.code:
## June
- Impact: cut onboarding drop-off investigation from days to hours
- Evidence: dashboard link, PR #418, support thread
- Collaboration: paired with data on event taxonomy
- Next: turn the debug checklist into team docs
blocks.caption: Small weekly notes become a strong quarterly narrative.

beats.heading: The doc is for more than promotion

blocks.html: A good brag doc helps your manager calibrate, helps you spot the work you want more of, and helps you notice when your job has drifted away from your goals. It turns career growth from folklore into data.

blocks.title: career signal lab
blocks.caption: Flip the switches and watch the story turn into a tiny operating model.
blocks.low: fuzzy: good work happened, but the signal is hard to carry forward
blocks.mid: clearer: your manager and peers can see some of the shape
blocks.high: legible: impact, support, and next steps are easy to inspect

beats.heading: It is not bragging if it is evidence

blocks.html: Engineers often under-write their own impact because it feels awkward. Do it anyway. Clear evidence is not ego. It is observability for your career.

items.title: Get your work recognized: write a brag document

sources.title: Get your work recognized: write a brag document
